{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Lindon's condition
| introduced = Dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] violated an oath to [[Mercy's mother]] and suffered a penalty that left him on the verge of death.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c12">''Dreadgod'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
